title: Feed sweep, 4 feed(s) (2026-07-23)
text:
Arbitrum protocol AFX Trade hit by $24 million bridge exploit: Blockaid
The Block
2026-07-23
PeckShield flagged that the attacker bridged the stolen funds from Arbitrum to Ethereum and swapped them for 12,467 ETH.
https://www.theblock.co/post/409482/arbitrum-protocol-afx-trade-exploit?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

South Korea’s Mirae Asset completes acquisition of Korbit crypto exchange
The Block
2026-07-23
Mirae Asset also plans to increase its stake from 92.06% to 97.15% through an additional deal later this week, local media reported.
https://www.theblock.co/post/409485/mirae-asset-completes-acquisition-korbit?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

Senator Lummis: Ethics, other provisions in crypto Clarity Act to be further discussed
CoinDesk: Bitcoin, Ethereum, Crypto News and Price Data
2026-07-22
Senator Cynthia Lummis, one of the lead negotiators on the bill, told CoinDesk she was "pleased" that the updated bill was ready for release.
https://www.coindesk.com/policy/2026/07/22/senator-lummis-ethics-other-provisions-in-crypto-clarity-act-to-be-further-discussed

Bitcoin wilts as oil and rates rise. Clarity Act odds tumble to 38%
CoinDesk: Bitcoin, Ethereum, Crypto News and Price Data
2026-07-23
Geopolitical risks, rising rates, and fresh regulatory setbacks send crypto lower as key Democrats demand stronger safeguards in the market structure bill.
https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2026/07/23/bitcoin-wilts-as-oil-and-rates-rise-clarity-act-odds-tumble-to-38

XRP whales accumulate as small holders capitulate
CoinDesk: Bitcoin, Ethereum, Crypto News and Price Data
2026-07-23
XRP whales accumulate 2.8% more tokens over five weeks as small holders capitulate, sending the price back above $1.16.
https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2026/07/23/xrp-whales-accumulate-as-small-holders-capitulate

Arbitrum-based AFX Trade drained of $24 million after bridge keys compromised
CoinDesk: Bitcoin, Ethereum, Crypto News and Price Data
2026-07-23
Security firms said the attacker used enough hot-validator signatures to approve a 24.15 million USDC withdrawal, while Arbitrum said its native bridge was not affected.
https://www.coindesk.com/tech/2026/07/23/arbitrum-based-afx-trade-drained-of-usd24-million-after-bridge-keys-compromised

Bitcoin, Ethereum-linked protocols lose $35 million in multiple attacks hours apart
CoinDesk: Bitcoin, Ethereum, Crypto News and Price Data
2026-07-23
The attacks hit Verus, B² Network and other cross-chain systems, showing how compromised keys, upgrade powers and validation checks can empty protocols without breaking the underlying cryptography.
https://www.coindesk.com/tech/2026/07/23/bitcoin-ethereum-linked-protocols-lose-usd35-million-in-multiple-attacks-hours-apart

South Korea's oldest crypto exchange is now part of the $1 trillion Mirae Group family
CoinDesk: Bitcoin, Ethereum, Crypto News and Price Data
2026-07-23
Korbit, South Korea's first cryptocurrency exchange, has joined the Mirae Asset Group family, marking the first time a traditional Korean financial group's affiliate has taken a controlling stake in a domestic crypto exchange.
https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2026/07/23/south-korea-s-oldest-crypto-exchange-is-now-part-of-the-usd800-billion-mirae-group-family
